_purpose: Anti-Generic Design System: These are SPECIFIC CSS/Tailwind overrides that make AI output look human-designed. Every value here was chosen because it DIFFERS from what LLMs generate by default. The AI should copy these values directly — not interpret them.

font_system._why: Font is the #1 tell of AI-generated UI. LLMs default to 'font-sans' (Inter/system-ui) with no OpenType features. Human designers use specific font stacks with tracking, tabular numerals, and optical sizing.

critical_css.monospace_data: font-family: 'Geist Mono', 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-feature-settings: 'ss01' 1;

anti_defaults: NEVER use text-base (16px) in a dashboard. Use text-[13px] or text-sm (14px) as body size.
NEVER use default Tailwind tracking. KPI numbers need tracking-tight or tracking-[-0.03em].
ALWAYS add tabular-nums to any number that might change or appear in columns.
ALWAYS add font-feature-settings to the root. Use Geist features: cv02, cv03, cv04, cv11.
Headings use -0.025em tracking. Labels use +0.01em. Numbers use -0.03em. These DIFFER.
Table headers are 11px uppercase with 0.05em tracking — NOT the same size as table cells.

spacing_system._why: AI-generated UIs have uniform spacing. Human-designed UIs use intentionally varied spacing that creates visual rhythm and hierarchy.
anti_defaults: Card stat padding is px-6 py-5, NOT p-4 or p-5 (creates slight vertical asymmetry).
KPI row uses gap-5 (20px), NOT gap-4 (16px) — slightly wider than default feels intentional.
Table wrapper has p-0 with overflow-hidden — the table edges touch the card border.
Chart cards use pb-4 (less than top padding) — charts need less bottom breathing room.
Sidebar items use py-[7px] — NOT py-2 (8px). The 1px difference feels less mechanical.

color_overrides._why: LLMs pick colors from their training data: saturated greens, reds, and purples. Human designers use muted, desaturated variants. These specific hex values break AI color defaults.

delta_colors._why: AI defaults to saturated green (#22c55e) and red (#ef4444). Mercury uses muted variants on dark backgrounds. The delta text should be subdued, not screaming.

anti_defaults: Background is #09090b (zinc-950), NOT #000000 or #111111. Pure black is harsh; zinc-950 is warm.
Surface is #111113, NOT #1a1a1a. The slight blue undertone creates depth.
Borders are rgba(255,255,255,0.06), NOT #333 or border-gray-700. Opacity borders adapt.
Delta green is text-emerald-400/80, NOT text-green-500. Desaturated + opacity = professional.
Delta red is text-red-400/70, NOT text-red-500. Muted reds don't scream.
Chart grid lines are rgba(255,255,255,0.04) — BARELY visible. AI makes them too strong.

component_code._why: Instead of placeholder [component:X] references, these are actual Tailwind class strings the AI should use directly.

stat_card_dark.wrapper: rounded-xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-[#111113] px-6 py-5
stat_card_dark.label: text-[13px] font-medium text-zinc-400
stat_card_dark.value: mt-1 text-3xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-zinc-50 tabular-nums
stat_card_dark.large_value: mt-1 text-[2.5rem] font-semibold tracking-[-0.03em] text-zinc-50 tabular-nums leading-none
stat_card_dark.delta_positive: mt-2 flex items-center gap-1 text-sm font-medium text-emerald-400/80
stat_card_dark.delta_negative: mt-2 flex items-center gap-1 text-sm font-medium text-red-400/70
stat_card_dark.delta_neutral: mt-2 flex items-center gap-1 text-sm font-medium text-zinc-500

primary_stat_card_dark._note: Use for the MAIN KPI — spans 2 columns, larger value. Creates asymmetry.
primary_stat_card_dark.wrapper: col-span-2 rounded-xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-[#111113] px-6 py-5
primary_stat_card_dark.label: text-[13px] font-medium text-zinc-400
primary_stat_card_dark.value: mt-1 text-[2.75rem] font-semibold tracking-[-0.03em] text-zinc-50 tabular-nums leading-none
primary_stat_card_dark.delta: mt-3 flex items-center gap-1.5 text-sm font-medium

sidebar_dark.container: fixed left-0 top-0 bottom-0 w-[240px] border-r border-white/[0.06] bg-[#09090b] flex flex-col
sidebar_dark.logo_icon: w-7 h-7 rounded-lg bg-zinc-800 flex items-center justify-center text-[13px] font-semibold text-zinc-50
sidebar_dark.nav_section: flex-1 px-2 py-2 flex flex-col gap-0.5
sidebar_dark.nav_item: flex items-center gap-2.5 px-3 py-[7px] rounded-lg text-[13px] font-medium text-zinc-500 hover:text-zinc-300 hover:bg-white/[0.04] transition-colors duration-150
sidebar_dark.nav_item_active: flex items-center gap-2.5 px-3 py-[7px] rounded-lg text-[13px] font-medium text-zinc-100 bg-white/[0.06]
sidebar_dark.section_label: px-3 mt-6 mb-1 text-[11px] font-medium uppercase tracking-[0.04em] text-zinc-600
sidebar_dark.user_area: mt-auto px-3 py-3 border-t border-white/[0.06] flex items-center gap-2.5
sidebar_dark.user_avatar: w-7 h-7 rounded-full bg-zinc-700 flex items-center justify-center text-[11px] font-medium text-zinc-300

table_dark.header_cell: px-6 py-3 text-left text-[11px] font-medium uppercase tracking-[0.05em] text-zinc-500
table_dark.cell_amount: px-6 py-3.5 text-[13px] font-medium text-right tabular-nums
table_dark.cell_amount_positive: px-6 py-3.5 text-[13px] font-medium text-right tabular-nums text-emerald-400/80
table_dark.cell_amount_negative: px-6 py-3.5 text-[13px] font-medium text-right tabular-nums text-red-400/70
table_dark.pagination: px-6 py-3 flex items-center justify-between text-[12px] text-zinc-500 border-t border-white/[0.04]

chart_dark.wrapper: rounded-xl border border-white/[0.06] bg-[#111113] p-6 pb-4
chart_dark.title: text-[15px] font-semibold text-zinc-200 tracking-[-0.01em]
chart_dark.legend_item: flex items-center gap-1.5 text-[11px] font-medium text-zinc-500
chart_dark.tooltip: bg-[#18181b] border border-white/[0.08] rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-[12px] shadow-lg

header_dark.wrapper: flex items-center justify-between px-8 py-4 border-b border-white/[0.06]
header_dark.icon_button: w-8 h-8 rounded-lg border border-white/[0.06] flex items-center justify-center text-zinc-500 hover:text-zinc-300 hover:bg-white/[0.04] transition-colors duration-150
header_dark.tab_group: flex items-center rounded-lg border border-white/[0.06] overflow-hidden
header_dark.tab: px-3 py-1.5 text-[12px] font-medium text-zinc-500 hover:text-zinc-300 transition-colors duration-150
header_dark.tab_active: px-3 py-1.5 text-[12px] font-medium text-zinc-100 bg-white/[0.06]
header_dark.primary_button: px-4 py-2 rounded-lg bg-zinc-100 text-[13px] font-medium text-zinc-900 hover:bg-white transition-colors duration-150

layout_patterns._why: Specific grid patterns that create hierarchy. AI defaults to equal columns.

dashboard_4_kpi.description: Primary KPI spans 2 cols, 3 secondary take remaining space. Creates clear hierarchy.

dashboard_6_kpi.description: Primary KPI full width on own row, 4 secondary below. Dramatic hierarchy.

dashboard_main_area.description: Main content takes 2/3, sidebar panel takes 1/3. Not equal.

anti_defaults: NEVER put 4 equal stat cards in a row. The primary KPI MUST be larger (col-span-2 or different text size).
NEVER split chart and table 50/50. Use 2:1 ratio (col-span-2 + col-span-1).
NEVER center-align KPI values. Left-align everything.
NEVER use justify-center on stat card content. Use text-left.
Gap between KPI cards is gap-5 (20px), NOT gap-4 (16px) — breaks the 'default' feel.

aesthetic_profiles._why: Named profiles let the AI say 'use Mercury style' and get a complete, specific set of values. Each profile is a verified set of tokens that work together.

mercury.vibe: near-black + green surgical accent + stark monochrome charts + zero decoration

linear.vibe: deep indigo-black + purple-blue accent + progress bars as primary visual + minimal icons

vercel.vibe: true black + blue accent + Geist typeface + pixel-perfect grid + zero warmth

stripe.vibe: warm white-blue + purple accent + generous whitespace + shadows over borders

notion.vibe: warm off-white + content-first + minimal chrome + warm grays (not blue-grays)

global_anti_patterns._critical: These are the MOST COMMON AI-generated design mistakes. If the generated code contains ANY of these, the MCP has failed.

patterns.name: The Equal Grid
patterns.description: 4 stat cards in a row, all same size. No hierarchy.
patterns.fix: Make primary KPI span 2 columns or use significantly larger text (text-[2.5rem] vs text-3xl).

patterns.name: The Purple Default
patterns.description: Using indigo/purple as the primary accent. This is the #1 AI color choice.
patterns.fix: Choose a color that matches the domain. Finance: green or blue. Project management: violet. Health: teal.

patterns.name: The Glass Card
patterns.description: backdrop-blur + bg-white/10 on cards. Nobody ships this in production dashboards.
patterns.fix: Solid background + 1px border. bg-[#111113] border border-white/[0.06]. Done.

patterns.name: The Gradient Button
patterns.fix: Solid bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-900 (dark mode) or bg-zinc-900 text-white (light mode).

patterns.name: The Glow Effect
patterns.description: Box shadows with colored glow. shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(99,102,241,0.3)].
patterns.fix: No shadows in dark mode. In light mode: shadow-sm at most.

patterns.name: The 16px Body
patterns.description: Using text-base (16px) as the default body size in a dashboard.
patterns.fix: Dashboards use text-[13px] body, text-sm (14px) max. Information density matters.

patterns.name: The Centered Everything
patterns.description: justify-center and text-center on stat cards and content.
patterns.fix: Left-align everything. Real dashboards are left-aligned. Only center hero text on landing pages.

patterns.name: The Icon Container
patterns.description: 40px colored circle with icon inside stat cards.
patterns.fix: No icons in stat cards. The number IS the visual. If icons are needed: inline, 16px, muted color.

patterns.name: The Rainbow Status
patterns.description: Multiple saturated colors for status badges (green, red, yellow, blue, purple).
patterns.fix: Use colored dots (w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full) next to text. NOT full colored badges.

patterns.name: The Default Font
patterns.description: font-sans with no tracking, no font-feature-settings, no tabular-nums.
patterns.fix: Add tracking-tight to KPIs, tracking-[0.05em] to table headers, tabular-nums to all numbers. Add font-feature-settings: 'cv02', 'cv03' to Inter/Geist.
